---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new parser, help, or completion capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What CLI shape or workflow can you not express today? A concrete consumer
example (real command line) is the most useful starting point.

## Proposed behavior

How the spec API and the parsed result should look.

## Alternatives considered

Workarounds you tried with the current API, and why they fall short.

## Scope check

`cl-cli` stays dependency-light and strict by default. Does this proposal add
runtime dependencies or relax strict parsing? If so, why is it worth it?
